data.title: Here's How Much $1000 Invested In Amazon.com 10 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
data.description:
Amazon.com (NASDAQ:AMZN) has outperformed the market over the past 10 years by 9.91% on an annualized basis producing an average annual return of 22.49%. Currently, Amazon.com has a market capitalization of $2.50 trillion.

Buying $1000 In AMZN: If an investor had bought $1000 of AMZN stock 10 years ago, it would be worth $7,747.40 today based on a price of $233.51 for AMZN at the time of writing.
